results.title: Ex-Premier League striker Marlon King WINS bitter court battle with his siblings over dad’s £600k will
results.description: FORMER Premier League striker Marlon King has won a bitter legal battle against his siblings over their late father’s £650,000 will. Marlon, 46, took legal action against his half-brother Marvin King and half-sister Leisha King, disputing whether the document had been properly signed by witnesses. The will had stated that the estate of Carl Vincent...
